task: RDT-G Phase 0b DENOMINATORS grounding (pre-registration: build/reserve/RDTG_prediction.md, commit 7ad70d2)

market_outstandings.definition: Outstanding stock of central/general government debt securities per candidate market, local currency, latest publication at or before end-2021 (pre-verdict-window stock); nearest publishable vintage stated per market.

JGB_JP.instrument: General Bonds (futsuu kokusai) outstanding, central government
JGB_JP.quoted_cell:
Sheet 'suii', row '普　通　国　債
 General Bonds', column 'R3.12末
2021 December' = 9681121; unit header cell: '（単位：億円）
（Unit: 100 million yen）'
JGB_JP.friction: The original quarterly release page e202112.html now returns 404 (site restructuring); the figure is read from the MoF's current time-series file 'Central Government Debt (End of June 2021 - present)' (suii.xls, last saved 2026-04-21), which carries the end-December-2021 column.
JGB_JP.confidence_reason: Publisher-primary file, exact labeled cell, unit annotation on the same sheet.

Bund_DE.instrument: Outstanding volume of Federal securities (Bundeswertpapiere), including own holdings; own-holdings line on the same sheet = -162,662,257,456 EUR (free float approx. EUR 1,427.2bn)
Bund_DE.quoted_cell: Sheet 'rpgOutstanding' (title row: 'Outstanding Volume & Own Holdings of Federal Securities'), row 'Outstanding volume', column '2021-12-31' = 1589900000000; row 'Own holdings' same column = -162662257456
Bund_DE.friction: The workbook is a continuously updated report (generated 2026-06-03); the 2021-12-31 column is the publisher's current vintage of the end-2021 stock. Own holdings are material (~10%); the bars step must state which basis it uses.

OAT_FR.unit: EUR million (UNIT_MEASURE=EUROS, UNIT_MULT=6); equals EUR 2,145.121 billion
OAT_FR.instrument: Negotiable central government debt outstanding amount - Total (OAT + BTF; encours de la dette negociable totale de l'Etat)
OAT_FR.publisher: INSEE BDM (insee.fr / bdm.insee.fr), official-statistics republication of the Agence France Tresor series
OAT_FR.retained: build/reserve/rdtg_evidence/denom_fr_insee_bdm_001739081.xml (series page shell: denom_fr_insee_serie_001739081.html; grouping page shell: denom_fr_insee_series_group_102765717.html)
OAT_FR.quoted_cell: Series IDBANK 001739081, TITLE_EN='Negotiable central government debt outstanding amount - Total', TIME_PERIOD="2021-12" OBS_VALUE="2145121"
OAT_FR.friction: The tasked primary publisher aft.gouv.fr is behind a Cloudflare JS challenge from this egress (direct curl and browser-UA curl return 'Just a moment...'; WebFetch returns 403; challenge pages retained as denom_fr_aft_bulletin_jan2022_cloudflare_challenge.html and denom_fr_aft_bulletins_index_cloudflare_challenge.html). budget.gouv.fr also 403 (Incapsula). The INSEE BDM series is the official-statistics channel for the AFT series; INSEE's catalogue lists it under the grouping titled 'Dette negociable de l'Etat Agence France Tresor', but that attribution line could not be captured server-side (the insee.fr page is a JS app) and is recorded UNVERIFIED-on-page. Under a strict publisher=AFT reading the gate may treat this market as NOT-GROUNDED.
OAT_FR.confidence_reason: Figure read from an official-statistics SDMX endpoint with exact metadata, but it is not the tasked primary publisher and the AFT-source attribution on the INSEE page did not render server-side.

gilt_UK.unit: GBP billion nominal (including inflation uplift for index-linked gilts)
gilt_UK.instrument: Total gilts in issue (conventional + index-linked incl. uplift), central government
gilt_UK.quoted_cell: Page 1: 'GILTS IN ISSUE ON 31 DECEMBER 2021 ... Total Amount Outstanding (including inflation uplift for index-linked gilts) = £2,113.64 billion nominal' (report generated from DMO database, Data Date: 02-Jul-2026)
gilt_UK.friction: The D1A report is generated on demand from the DMO database with a COBDate parameter; the CSV export variant returns only the conventional-gilt section (58 bonds, no totals, no index-linked block), so the PDF export is the grounding document. Report content reflects the current database vintage of the 31-Dec-2021 stock.
gilt_UK.confidence_reason: Publisher-primary report with the total stated in one quoted line for the exact as-of date.

AGS_AU.instrument: Australian Government Securities on issue (face value)
AGS_AU.retained: build/reserve/rdtg_evidence/denom_au_aofm_wayback_fetch_blocked.txt (egress-block response for the attempted archive fallback)
AGS_AU.friction: aofm.gov.au is unreachable from this egress: WebFetch returned HTTP 503 on /data-hub (twice) and /securities; curl (HTTP/2) failed with stream INTERNAL_ERROR; curl (HTTP/1.1, multiple browser UAs, 30-60s timeouts) timed out with 0 bytes on www.aofm.gov.au and on the apex-domain 301 target; robots.txt fetch also failed. Internet Archive fallback (web.archive.org snapshot 20220106113229 of the AOFM homepage) is blocked by the environment egress policy, and WebFetch cannot reach web.archive.org. RBA statistical tables carry no AGS-on-issue outstanding table (only holdings-classified tables A3.1/A3.2, which are discriminator-adjacent and were NOT opened). No figure is recorded; nothing was substituted from memory.
AGS_AU.consequence: Per the pre-registered Scheme 1 rule, the AGS market drops out of the market-size-proportional allocation, with the drop stated by the bars step; Scheme 2's AUD share maps to a market whose denominator is not grounded and must be carried as a stated remainder or re-grounded before use.
AGS_AU.confidence_reason: No publisher figure obtained; failure fully stated.

GoC_CA.instrument: Marketable bonds payable in Canadian currency, Government of Canada (unmatured market debt component)
GoC_CA.publisher: Statistics Canada table 10-10-0002-01 'Central government debt' (CANSIM 191-0002); cube note 1: 'Source: Department of Finance Canada.'
GoC_CA.friction: Monthly financial data are unaudited (cube note 2) and revised retroactively on methodology changes (cube note 3). Marketable bonds payable in foreign currencies (15,859 CAD mn) are excluded from this local-currency figure by construction.
GoC_CA.confidence_reason: Official-statistics full-table download with exact vector (v86822809) and the Department of Finance Canada source note; StatCan is within the tasked publisher set.

cofer_shares.status: GROUNDED-FROM-DISK (committed artifact from the RDT stage; no new fetch needed)
cofer_shares.vintage: IMF COFER dataset IMF.STA:COFER(7.0.1), PUBLICATION_DATE 2026-03-27 (XML header), fetched 2026-07-01 via api.imf.org SDMX 2.1; post-2025Q3 methodology (unallocated eliminated with revisions back to 2000Q1; missing values imputed by IMF staff per IMF TNM/2025/14) - this caveat travels with any use of these shares
cofer_shares.basis: shares of allocated reserves, per cent (INDICATOR=AFXRA, TYPE_OF_TRANSFORMATION=SHRO_PT, COUNTRY=G001 World, FREQUENCY=Q); under the post-2025Q3 methodology allocated = total (100% coverage, partially imputed)
cofer_shares.note: Raw shares only, as pre-registered; the non-USD CNY-excluded renormalization is computed later by the bars step, never here.
cofer_shares.checked: 2026-07-02 (read from the committed file; original fetch 2026-07-01, provenance: build/reserve/rdt_k4_provenance.md section 5)
cofer_shares.confidence_reason: Publisher-primary SDMX payload already committed on disk; values re-extracted programmatically from the retained XML; the 2025Q3 methodology break is grounded and stated.

fx_set.publisher: Federal Reserve Board, H.10 Foreign Exchange Rates weekly release, Release Date: January 3, 2022
fx_set.rate_date_note: December 31, 2021 is shown as 'ND' (no data) for all currencies on this release; December 30, 2021 is the last certified 2021 observation and is used as the end-2021 rate set.
fx_set.quoted_lines: H.10 table '(Rates in currency units per U.S. dollar except as noted)', column 'Dec. 30': *EMU MEMBERS EURO 1.1318; *UNITED KINGDOM POUND 1.3500; *AUSTRALIA DOLLAR 0.7260; JAPAN YEN 115.1700; CANADA DOLLAR 1.2777; SWITZERLAND FRANC 0.9146; Dec. 31 column = 'ND' throughout
fx_set.on_disk_check: build/data and build/contracts were searched first; no committed end-2021 FX artifact exists, so the H.10 release was fetched and retained.
fx_set.confidence_reason: Single grounded publisher release covering all six currencies on one page, consistent quotation conventions stated by the publisher.

sequencing_attestation: No discriminator series was read, fetched, or opened in this task: no SAFE SDDS template contents, no destination-country bond-holdings, balance-of-payments-by-counterpart, or nonresident-share series from Part 1 or Part 2 of RDTG_prediction.md. Co-presence register (pages retained where discriminator material was adjacent but NOT extracted): (1) the DMO gilts-in-issue index page (denom_uk_dmo_gilts_in_issue_index.html) contains a navigation link to 'Government Holdings' gilt-market pages - link not followed, no holdings content on the retained page; (2) the RBA statistical tables index (probe only, retained in scratchpad, not in evidence) listed 'Holdings of Australian Government Securities and Semis - A3.1/A3.2' as link titles - files not opened; (3) AOFM search-result snippets mentioned an 'AGS investor base' page and 'AGS Investor Chart Pack' - never opened (the AOFM site was unreachable in any case); (4) the Finanzagentur workbook, MoF suii.xls, StatCan table 10-10-0002-01, DMO D1A report, INSEE BDM series, H.10 release, and the COFER world-aggregate XML contain no nonresident-holdings columns for any candidate market. The COFER shares are a pre-registered denominator input (Scheme 2), not a discriminator. The pre-registration file itself (RDTG_prediction.md) was read as tasked; prior-stage provenance rdt_k4_provenance.md was read only to locate the committed COFER artifact.
